Package org.eventb.core.sc.state

Interface IVariantInfo

All Superinterfaces:
ISCState, IState
@Deprecated public interface IVariantInfo extends ISCState
Deprecated.
This interface is no longer used
Former state component for the variant of the current machine being checked.
Since:
1.0
